title: Pahadi Maggi
description: A warm, spicy hill-style noodle bowl with onion, tomato, masala, and fresh coriander.
steps: Heat oil and lightly sauté the onion.
Add tomatoes and cook until slightly soft.
Add ginger-garlic paste, salt, chilli powder, and masala; sauté briefly.
Add enough water for a soupy consistency, then add tastemaker and cardamom.
Add noodles and cook until done. Garnish with coriander.
notes: Imported from the original Singh's Connoisseur Corner recipe collection.
